strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, embedded, infrastructure, and data systems, meeting the 15-year minimum requirement.
Active hands-on AI work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, demonstrating current relevance to the AI focus of the role.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; holds a BS in CS and a Fine Arts degree, leaving the preferred advanced credential unmet.
Experience is execution-oriented (building, shipping, optimizing) with no evidence of strategic advisory work with enterprise customers or partners at the scale this role demands.

No demonstrated recognition as an external AI thought leader — no published research, conference keynotes, or industry influence commensurate with a director-level IC advising on cloud and AI strategy.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the tenure bar and brings genuine breadth across systems, but this role is a director-level IC position centered on AI strategy, enterprise customer advisory, and recognized external thought leadership — a profile his resume does not yet support. His current AI work at re:cinq is implementation-level tooling rather than platform strategy, and there is no track record of influencing technical direction at organizational or industry scale, which is the core expectation of the role.
